content: If ability text includes a qualifier followed by multiple terms, the qualifier applies to each item in the list, if applicable (e.g. 'each ready character and attachment' — 'ready' applies to both).

After a minion with the quickstrike keyword engages a player whose identity is in hero form, that minion attacks that player.

  • Equivalent to:
    Forced Response (Hero): After this minion engages a player, it attacks that player.
  • If being revealed, quickstrike resolves after any 'When Revealed' abilities on that minion.
